api: CoinAPI Market Data REST API v1/v2 (https://rest.coinapi.io, sandbox https://rest-sandbox.coinapi.io)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: reviewed the current, live CoinAPI Market Data REST API OpenAPI spec (50 method+path operations across v1 and v2, fetched from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/api-bricks/api-bricks-sdk/master/coinapi/market-data-api-rest/spec/openapi.yaml -- the canonical source CoinAPI's own docs page links to; the docs.coinapi.io site itself blocks automated fetches, so this spec, plus a live unauthenticated probe of https://rest.coinapi.io to confirm host/auth-gate behavior, was the review source). CoinAPI is entirely read-only (every documented operation is GET; there is no write/mutation surface at all, consistent with legacy). 9 streams now cover the practical surface: the original 5 (symbols, exchanges, assets, ohlcv_historical_data, trades_historical_data -- symbols retains legacy's all-exchanges GET /v1/symbols endpoint to preserve emitted data scope, see docs.md) plus 4 new in this pass (exchange_rates, quotes_current, orderbook_current, metrics_listing). The remaining ~41 operations are genuinely out of scope: latest/current/history variants of already-covered resources (duplicate_of), per-entity metrics values requiring iteration over the large metrics catalog, order-book depth/v3-envelope/history variants, options-chain data, blockchain-chain metadata, and icon image binaries.

excluded.reason: returns branding icon image binaries (PNG), not structured market data
Pass B full-surface review: endpoint reviewed and intentionally not implemented in this pass

historical exchange-rate timeseries for one base/quote pair; Pass B full-surface expansion covers the current-rate snapshot only
returns branding icon image binaries (PNG), not structured market data
single-exchange detail is a strict subset of the covered exchanges list stream (same fields, client-side filterable); not implemented as a separate stream
